project.name: Project Constellation
project.summary: All workstreams tracking to plan. API migration completed ahead of schedule. Mobile experience on track for April GA release.

workItems.title: API v2 Endpoint Migration
workItems.description: Migrated all 47 endpoints from v1 to v2 with backward compatibility layer.

workItems.title: Auth Token Refresh Flow
workItems.description: Implemented silent token refresh eliminating session timeouts.

workItems.title: Dashboard Analytics Module
workItems.description: New real-time analytics widgets for executive stakeholders.

workItems.title: Mobile Responsive Redesign
workItems.description: Reworking all views for mobile-first responsive layout.

workItems.title: Performance Optimization Sprint
workItems.description: Targeting sub-200ms P95 latency on core read paths.

workItems.title: Accessibility Compliance (WCAG 2.1)
workItems.description: Auditing and remediating all UI components for AA compliance.

workItems.title: Legacy Report Export
workItems.description: CSV export for legacy report format requested by Finance.

workItems.title: SSO Integration for Partner Portal
workItems.description: SAML-based SSO for external partner access.
